question: Q-14
purpose: Instrument-continuity test: feed the verbatim Phase 73 Run B baseline vector (sigma=0.5, gamma_1=14.1347) to the CURRENT CAILculator v2.1.4 server and compare against the observables recorded on 2026-04-29 (KSJ AIEX-586/587) under v2.0.3.
tool: CAILculator v2.1.4 / ZDTP v2.0 / profile=RHI / gateway=all (live MCP call)
input_provenance: CAILculator_Phase73_Runs_AB.md, Run B sigma=0.5 vector, verbatim
verdict: EXACT instrument continuity. The v2.1.4 server reproduces the 2026-04-29 v2.0.3 recorded observables (mean 35.38, conv 0.4274, B/A 3.66) on the historical input, and the Gateway Linear Law replica matches the server to ~1e-12 on all six magnitudes. The Phase 73 magnitude channel is retroactively law-consistent; the Phase 75 Q-2/Q-4 published tables remain the sole law-incompatible record (see infeasibility certificate in phase77_q14_reconciliation.json).
